channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: PacTech Pulse: March 2026
item.description: This edition of PacTech Pulse covers March 2026.

item.title: Deterrence at Scale: Cross-Theater Defense Cooperation in an Age of Precise Mass
item.description: As Russia and China pressure U.S. allies, deterrence increasingly depends on factories, not just forces. The answer lies not in identical arsenals, but in selectively integrated defense industries built to produce the right capabilities at scale.

item.title: Enter Europe’s Cyber Deterrence
item.description: Is European cyber deterrence possible? Europe faces a perfect storm of increased cyberattacks and hybrid warfare, a resurgent Russia, and waning U.S. engagement. To counter these challenges, a new European Cyber Operations Group is urgently needed.
